title: Capability Maturity Assessment Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Capability Maturity Assessment skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

list_capability_domains.description: List of capability domains to be assessed (e.g., data management, procurement, risk management, IT service delivery)

chosen_maturity_model.description: Chosen maturity model and its level descriptors (CMMI v2.0, P3M3, or a client-specific framework)

access_key_stakeholders.description: Access to key stakeholders across assessed domains for structured interviews

existing_process_documentation.description: Existing process documentation, policies, standard operating procedures, and prior audit or assessment reports

benchmarking_data.description: Benchmarking data from peer organizations or industry surveys to enable comparative scoring

strategic_objectives_transformation.description: Strategic objectives or transformation roadmap to weight capability importance during prioritization
